✅POST /v1/api/auth/refresh → 400 без токена

✅GET /v1/api/tables → 200 + array
✅GET /v1/api/tables?search → FTS
✅POST /api/tables → create table
✅GET /v1/api/tables/:id → get single
✅GET /v1/api/tables/999999 → 404
✅PATCH /v1/api/tables/:id/visibility
✅GET /v1/api/tables/:id/snapshots
